title: Card Meta
description: Metadata about a Character Card V4, including creator information, versioning, timestamps, and cryptographic signatures.

id.title: Card ID
id.description: Unique identifier for this character card.

creator.title: Creator
creator.description: Name or handle of the card's creator.

creator_notes.title: Creator Notes
creator_notes.description: Free-form notes from the creator about this card.

creator_notes_multilingual.title: Creator Notes (Multilingual)
creator_notes_multilingual.description: Localized creator notes keyed by language code (e.g., 'en', 'ja', 'ko').

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: List of tags for categorization and discovery.

source.title: Source
source.description: URLs or identifiers indicating where this card was originally published.

character_version.title: Character Version
character_version.description: Version string for this iteration of the character.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this card was first created.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this card was last modified.

content_hash.title: Content Hash
content_hash.description: Hash of the card's content for change detection and integrity verification.

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Cryptographic signature to verify the card's authenticity and integrity.

method.title: Signature Method
method.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

public_key.title: Public Key
public_key.description: The public key used to verify the signature.

signature.title: Signature Value
signature.description: The cryptographic signature of the card content.

key_source.title: Key Source
key_source.description: URI where the public key can be retrieved for independent verification.
